privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real digital forensic test image (NTFS File Recovery Test Image) downloaded from the DFTT/CFReDS projects. The underlying ground truth is pre-computed directly from the disk image using The Sleuth Kit's 'fls' command via Python in setup_task.sh. All expected case metadata, disk image paths, and output file locations precisely match the task instructions and are successfully cross-verified against the setup and verifier scripts.
